hero.headline: Katrin's Studio
hero.subline: Pilates reformer training, TRX, and personalized fitness programs — with close, hands-on coaching every step of the way.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Expert-led training programs designed to strengthen, tone, and transform your body

reformer.title: Pilates Reformer
reformer.description: Full-body conditioning on state-of-the-art reformer machines. Build core strength, improve posture, and achieve lean muscle tone in every session.

trx.title: TRX & Functional Training
trx.description: Suspension training that uses your body weight to develop strength, balance, flexibility, and core stability for real-world movement.

personal.title: Personal Training
personal.description: One-on-one sessions tailored entirely to your goals, fitness level, and schedule. Your body, your pace, your results.

group.title: Group Classes
group.description: Small, intimate sessions with group energy and personal attention. Maximum 8 participants per class — because everyone deserves to be seen.

about.title: A Studio Built on Passion and Precision
about.body1: Katrin Studio was founded by Katrin Yair, a certified fitness trainer and graduate of Wingate Academic College. With expertise in strength training, functional movement, TRX, Pilates, and body sculpting, Katrin brings a holistic approach to every session.
about.body2: Our studio is built on three pillars: professionalism, family atmosphere, and close personal guidance. Whether you're a complete beginner or an experienced athlete, you'll find a supportive second home here.

whyUs.title: What Sets Us Apart?
whyUs.subtitle: Expert instruction, professional equipment, and a welcoming community — everything you need to see real results.

equipment.title: Professional Equipment
equipment.description: State-of-the-art reformers and professional-grade equipment for the best possible training experience.

instructors.title: Expert Instructors
instructors.description: Certified professionals with years of experience who are dedicated to your progress and safety.

community.title: Welcoming Community
community.description: A supportive, inclusive environment where beginners and advanced athletes train side by side.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of members who have transformed their bodies and lives — and be next.

testimonials.title: Real Results, Real Stories
testimonials.subtitle: Hundreds of members have transformed their bodies and lives — your story is next.

1.name: Michal R.
1.body: I came to Katrin Studio after years of back pain. After just three months of reformer sessions my posture improved dramatically and the pain is almost gone. Katrin's personal guidance made all the difference.

2.name: Tal B.
2.body: I've tried many places before, but nothing compares to the experience here. The equipment is top-notch, the atmosphere is warm and welcoming, and someone truly cares about your progress. I've never felt stronger.

3.name: Noa S.
3.body: The small group classes are perfect – intimate enough for personal attention but still fun and social. My core strength and flexibility have improved beyond what I thought possible.

contact.title: Start Your Transformation
contact.subtitle: Fill in your details and we'll get back to you within 24 hours to schedule your first session.

fields.name: Full Name

blog.title: Fitness & Wellness Blog
blog.subtitle: Expert articles on Pilates, functional training, and living your healthiest life
blog.ctaBody: Join us at Katrin Studio for expert-led Pilates and fitness classes.

footer.tagline: Katrin's Studio — Pilates & fitness in Afula.
